title: Execution Plans Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on reading and optimizing database query execution plans.

questions.question: Which command is used to see the internal roadmap a database uses to execute a query?
What is a 'Seq Scan' (Sequential Scan) in an execution plan?
options: A full table scan (reading every single row)

questions.question: Which of these indicates that the database is correctly using an index?
What is 'Cost' in the context of an execution plan?
options: The actual dollar amount spent on the database
An internal unit the database uses to estimate the resource usage of a query step
The time it takes to write a query
The number of users allowed to access the database
